revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "[[Category:Pages we need to rename]]{{citation needed|"
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Immanuelle moved page [[Category:二本松市の建築物]] to [[Category:Architecture of Nihonmatsu City]]: Merge [[Category:二本松市の建築物]] into [[Category:Architecture of Nihonmatsu City]] via bot
Bot: remove obsolete category Pages we need to rename
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "{{citation needed|"
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[福島県]][[二本松市]]の建築物に関するカテゴリ。
{{DEFAULTSORT:にほんまつしのけんちくふつ}}
{{座標一覧}} [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
==Local Content== {{citation needed|にほんまつしのけんちくふつ}} {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:二本松市の建築物]]}} {{translated page|ja|Category:二本松市の建築物|version=62582533}} {{translated page|ja|二本松市の建築物|2=Category:二本松市の建築物|comment=minor fix to get the category to display, cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} [[Category:Buildings in Fukushima prefecture by municipality]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Nihonmatsu, Fukushima]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[ja:Category:二本松市の建築物]] [[ko:Category:니혼마쓰시의 건축물]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Okitsu Shrine (Nihonmatsu)]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q27992910)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:"
Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|"
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]]"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q27992910)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "[[Ja:" to "[[ja:"
Text replacement - "{{Wikidata link|" to "{{wikidata link|"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)

revision.comment: Bot: remove legacy category-page templates ({{デフォルトソート}}, {{citation needed}}) [[git:Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/22502775894|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:二本松市の建築物}} {{translated page|ja|Category:二本松市の建築物|version=62582533}} {{translated page|ja|二本松市の建築物|2=Category:二本松市の建築物|comment=minor fix to get the category to display, cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{wikidata link|Q27992910}} <!--interwikis--> [[ja:Category:二本松市の建築物]] [[ko:Category:니혼마쓰시의 건축물]] <!--categories--> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Okitsu Shrine (Nihonmatsu)]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Fukushima prefecture by municipality]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Nihonmatsu, Fukushima]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] (crud category cleanup) [[git:Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/22535397968|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{座標一覧}}
{{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:二本松市の建築物}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:二本松市の建築物|version=62582533}}
{{translated page|ja|二本松市の建築物|2=Category:二本松市の建築物|comment=minor fix to get the category to display, cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}}
{{wikidata link|Q27992910}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[ja:Category:二本松市の建築物]]
[[ko:Category:니혼마쓰시의 건축물]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Okitsu Shrine (Nihonmatsu)]]
[[Category:Buildings and structures in Fukushima prefecture by municipality]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]
[[Category:Nihonmatsu, Fukushima]]
[[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]
[[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] (crud category cleanup) [[git:Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/22556809750|manual triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 2 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25457515052|time triggered pipeline]]
